title: Jefferies Initiates Terawulf with Buy Rating on AI Data Center Growth
text: Jefferies initiated coverage on Terawulf with a Buy rating and a $28.00 price target. Jefferies describes Terawulf as a power-first digital infrastructure developer with a repeatable model of acquiring brownfield industrial sites and converting them into AI data centers. The firm's investment thesis centers on the company's continued brownfield conversions, where each incremental lease transforms idle power into contracted cash flow while reducing reliance on bitcoin mining. The company currently operates approximately 2.9 gigawatts across five sites with tenants including Core42 and Fluidstack (partially backed by Alphabet).
